---
title: "Experiment 2: Variable θ, Constant Sequence Length"
---

## Training

The model was trained on trajectories sampled from a **distribution of $\theta$ values** with a constant sequence length of 100.

```bash
python scripts/data_gen.py
python scripts/train.py
```

## Theta Sweep Test

After training, the model was evaluated over the same $(\theta, L)$ grid as Experiment 1: 25 $\theta$ values × 9 sequence lengths (5 to 400 in steps of 50), with 5,000 replicates per cell.

```bash
python scripts/test.py --coef 0  # conditional mean
python scripts/test.py --coef 1  # conditional variance
```

See [Results](results2.qmd) for analysis.
